name: linETFSetDirtyFlag
title: linETFSetDirtyFlag
description: With this function it is possible to set/clear the dirty flag of an associated frame. If the dirty flag of an associated frame is set when the corresponding event-triggered frame is being requested, then the LIN hardware will try to transmit the associated frame's data. The dirty flag gets reset automatically when the associated frame has been sent successfully – either via the event-triggered frame or unconditionally.

parameters.name: assocId
parameters.description: Identifier of unconditional frame LIN frame identifier of associated (unconditional) frame whose dirty flag should be set or cleared. Value range: 0 .. 63

parameters.name: dirty
parameters.description: 1: Set the dirty flag. 0: Clear the dirty flag.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
